observations: The requested process exited without starting a simulator session.
Steam started AssettoCorsa.exe and the vanilla launcher initialized.
The launcher rewrote staged race.ini values from its saved UI state.
The exact pre-attempt race.ini bytes were restored and hash-verified.
Existing AssettoCorsa.exe launcher processes were still running.
The preflight stopped before staging or launching.
After those processes were closed, the retry started acs.exe directly without the vanilla launcher.
The simulator consumed the staged multi-session race.ini and left it byte-for-byte unchanged.
A new two-session race_out.json was produced after process exit.
The exact pre-attempt race.ini bytes were restored and hash-verified.
The observed race classification contained zero completed laps and must not be accepted as a completed result.
